intro_cards.title: Being Good At: のが上手
intro_cards.body:
のが上手 (じょうず) means 'to be good at doing ~.'

Pattern: [plain verb]のが上手です

• 彼は歌うのが上手です。(He is good at singing.)
• 料理を作るのが上手ですね。(You're good at cooking!)

の nominalizes the verb: 歌う → 歌うの = 'the act of singing'

Related expressions:
• のが下手 — bad at • のが好き — like doing
• のがとくい — skilled at / forte
• のがにがて — weak point

Note: 上手ですね is polite for complimenting others.
For your own skill, とくい sounds more natural than 上手.
